blurb: One significant headline-level signal this run: a US government export-control directive reportedly suspending access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models (announced Jun 12). Full text not captured — Anthropic's RSS feeds 404'd, so this is title-only pending a clean read.

publications.title: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
publications.summary: [Headline only — body not captured this run.] Anthropic's news page surfaces an announcement that the US government issued an export-control directive suspending all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5. If accurate, this is a material frontier-policy event (export controls reaching specific frontier models). Needs a full read before summarising substance; not fabricating detail beyond the headline.

notes: [source feed broken] Seed blogRssUrl https://www.anthropic.com/news/rss.xml returns 404; https://www.anthropic.com/rss.xml also 404. Only https://www.anthropic.com/news (HTML) resolves, and readability captured a single item. Needs a working feed URL or a direct article URL. Flag to Techie for the ingestion pipeline (src/lib/rss). Until fixed, Anthropic coverage is degraded to headline-scraping.
